topic: Sharing and Exporting Readings for Clients or Personal Review
learningGoal: Practitioners understand when to export, what to share, and how to keep communication clear and consent-based.
keyPoints: Use exports when a client needs a structured takeaway they can revisit after a session
Share the reading with enough context that the client knows what they are looking at and how to use it
Keep exported materials focused on interpretation and reflection rather than deterministic claims
Confirm client consent before sending personalized materials outside the app
toneNotes: Professional and bounded. This is about trustworthy practitioner delivery, not aggressive upsell.
